summary: Completed comprehensive testing of notification system functionality for Centralita Virtual dashboard. Tested badge display, panel opening, filtering, navigation, and mark as read features.

ui_bugs.issue: localStorage data not persisting - no 'centralita-notifications' data found in browser storage
Notification bell not accessible on mobile viewport (390x844)

integration_issues.issue: Frequent session timeouts causing redirects to login page during testing

passed_tests: Badge shows correct unread notification count (7)
Click on bell opens notification panel successfully
Panel displays 10 mock notifications with proper structure
Three filter tabs present and functional (Todas, No leídas, Urgentes)
Notifications show title, message, priority badges, and timestamps
Unread indicators (blue dots) visible on unread notifications
Mark all read button present and accessible
Notification types properly configured (incidencias, llamadas, comunicados, etc.)
Priority levels displayed correctly (Urgente, Alta, Media, Baja)
Relative timestamps working (Hace 30 min, Hace 2h, etc.)
Notification panel uses Popover component correctly
ScrollArea component working for notification list
Proper tenant filtering for santa-gadea tenant
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix localStorage persistence issue in useNotificationStore - data should persist between page reloads. Improve mobile responsiveness for notification bell. Address session timeout issues causing frequent re-authentication.
success_percentage: frontend: 85% - Core functionality working, minor issues with persistence and mobile
